text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp has begun. This year, Smart Falcon
is accompanying us for training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey seeks to improve further so that
she may open the way for a lost Hokko Tarumae,
who once did the same for her.
